Motion To Dismiss Due To Plaintiffs' Failure To Amend Following Granting Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan Lamb, Esq. (415-997-9529) of Lamb& Frischer Law Firm for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JON GREENBERG's Motion To Dismiss Due To Plaintiffs' Failure To Amend Following Granting Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Defendant Jon Greenberg's motion to dismiss him from this case due to the failure of plaintiffs to file an amended complaint after Mr. Greenberg's successful motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. Mr. Greenberg is dismissed from this case. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order is signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
